name: compliance sync mechanism: reads COMPLIANCE-URLS.yaml as its source of truth and exits 0 on a valid catalog
command:
mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro generated-code-quality-standards && printf -- '- id: nist-ai-rmf
  name: NIST AI RMF
  url: https://www.nist.gov/itl/ai-risk-management-framework
  authoritative_publisher: NIST
  jurisdiction: us
  applicable_to: [ai-systems]
  identifier_scheme: nist-framework
  why_authoritative: |
    Published by NIST.
    Federal agency mandate.
    Widely adopted across US AI work.
  fetch_frequency: weekly
  legal_review_required: false
  paywalled: false
' > .claude-tdd-pro/COMPLIANCE-URLS.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/compliance/sync-from-sources.sh" --catalog "$PWD/.claude-tdd-pro/COMPLIANCE-URLS.yaml" --target "$PWD/generated-code-quality-standards" && echo ok 1>&2
